LanguageData.Ammo_8x60mmConstitution_FMJ.label: 8x60mm Constitution (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_8x60mmConstitution_FMJ.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles, and the occasional assault rifle.

LanguageData.Ammo_8x60mmConstitution_HE.description: Large rifle bullet used in machine guns, sniper rifles, and the occasional assault rifle.
